title: BEM-896 policy gate
objective:
Run script:
"""
Path('governance/policy').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
Path('governance/tools').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
Path('governance/reports').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

policy = {
  'status':'active',
  'name':'autonomy_policy_gate',
  'allow_without_operator':['routine_development','validation','report_packaging','registry_update','selftest','workspace_promotion'],
  'operator_gate_required':['strategic_decision','scope_expansion','unresolved_blocker','security_secret','paid_api','issue_31_write','schedule_trigger_change'],
  'default':'allow_if_task_is_inside_accepted_backlog_and_has_owner_and_proof_path',
  'rules':['RULE-011','RULE-012']
}
Path('governance/state/policy_gate.json').write_text(json.dumps(policy, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')

samples = [
  {'task_id':'BEM-896-001','kind':'validation','owner':'WRK-C2','expected':'ALLOW'},
  {'task_id':'SCOPE-CHANGE-001','kind':'scope_expansion','owner':'WRK-C2','expected':'GATE_OPERATOR'},
  {'task_id':'PAID-API-001','kind':'paid_api','owner':'WRK-C2','expected':'GATE_OPERATOR'}
]
Path('governance/policy/policy_gate_samples.json').write_text(json.dumps(samples, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')

def evaluate(task):
    kind = task.get('kind')
    if kind in policy['operator_gate_required']:
        return 'GATE_OPERATOR'
    if kind in policy['allow_without_operator']:
        return 'ALLOW'
    return 'GATE_OPERATOR'

results = []
errors = []
for sample in samples:
    decision = evaluate(sample)
    row = dict(sample)
    row['decision'] = decision
    row['ok'] = decision == sample['expected']
    if not row['ok']:
        errors.append(sample['task_id'] + ': expected ' + sample['expected'] + ' got ' + decision)
    results.append(row)
Path('governance/reports/BEM896_POLICY_GATE_RESULTS.json').write_text(json.dumps({'status':'PASS' if not errors else 'FAIL','results':results,'errors':errors}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')

tool = '''# BEM-896 policy gate evaluator
import json
from pathlib import Path
policy = json.loads(Path("governance/state/policy_gate.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
def evaluate(task):
    kind = task.get("kind")
    if kind in policy["operator_gate_required"]:
        return "GATE_OPERATOR"
    if kind in policy["allow_without_operator"]:
        return "ALLOW"
    return "GATE_OPERATOR"
samples = json.loads(Path("governance/policy/policy_gate_samples.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
errors = []
for sample in samples:
    decision = evaluate(sample)
    print(sample["task_id"] + " -> " + decision)
    if decision != sample["expected"]:
        errors.append(sample["task_id"])
raise SystemExit(0 if not errors else 1)
'''
Path('governance/tools/evaluate_policy_gate.py').write_text(tool, encoding='utf-8')
status = 'PASS' if not errors else 'FAIL'
Path('governance/reports/BEM896_POLICY_GATE.md').write_text('# BEM-896 Policy gate\n\nStatus: ' + status + '\n\nALLOW routine tasks; gate operator for strategic/scope/blocker/security/paid API/issue/schedule cases.\n\nErrors: ' + (', '.join(errors) if errors else 'none') + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM896_POLICY_GATE_' + status + '.md')
marker.write_text('# BEM-896 policy gate proof\nStatus: ' + status + '\nErrors: ' + (', '.join(errors) if errors else 'none') + '\n', encoding='utf-8')

backlog = Path('governance/autonomy/NEXT_EXECUTABLE_BACKLOG.json')
if backlog.exists():
    b = json.loads(backlog.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
    for item in b.get('items', []):
        if item.get('id') == 'BEM-896-001':
            item['status'] = 'completed'
            item['proof'] = str(marker)
        elif 'status' not in item:
            item['status'] = 'pending'
    backlog.write_text(json.dumps(b, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')

changed_files.extend(['governance/state/policy_gate.json','governance/policy/policy_gate_samples.json','governance/reports/BEM896_POLICY_GATE_RESULTS.json','governance/tools/evaluate_policy_gate.py','governance/reports/BEM896_POLICY_GATE.md',str(marker),'governance/autonomy/NEXT_EXECUTABLE_BACKLOG.json'])
ops_applied.append('BEM896 policy gate ' + status)
"""
No issue comments.
